name: Sweet-And-Sour Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Chinese white rice vinegar (or Cider vinegar)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the ingredients in a small bowl.
2. Mix thoroughly until well combined.
3. Transfer the mixture to a small dish if it will be used immediately; otherwise, place it in a jar and refrigerate until needed.
4. This subtle yet tasty sweet-and-sour sauce pairs well with deep-fried foods like Fried Wonton.
5. Store in a tightly sealed jar in the refrigerator for up to 1/2 Cup.
